$comment: edit_file: a surgical edit to one file in the ACTIVE WORKSPACE (the project). Reads the file, plans which KBs the change needs, regenerates it with the change (grounded in the chosen KBs), stages+builds the WHOLE project (cl, the oracle), repairs up to twice (grounded in the MSVC error docs), logs the edit. proj = $workspace; path + request come from $input (split head/tail).
summary: Refactor a function/class, fix a bug, or apply a change to an existing C++ file in the active workspace; rebuild the whole project to verify and repair up to twice.
